title: DouyinScriptInput
description: Input schema for the Douyin Short Video Script Writer skill

topic.description: The main topic or theme of the short video
examples: 为什么你总是存不下钱

duration.description: Target video duration in seconds. Supported: 15, 30, or 60.

style.description: Video style / tone. Affects script language, pacing, and BGM suggestions.

productName.description: Product name — required for e-commerce / product promotion scripts

sellingPoints.description: Key selling points — required for e-commerce / product promotion scripts

cta.description: Call-to-action text for the final section

examples.topic: 为什么你总是存不下钱
